rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Issue And Terminating Sanctions For Disobeying Court Order Compelling Attendance At Deposition;
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Thursday, August 28, 2008, Petitioner/CONSERVATEE ELIZABETH ZUT'S motion for issue and terminating sanctions is granted in part. The motion for issue sanctions is denied. The motion for terminating sanctions as to defendant Pedro Miranda is granted. The answer and all affirmative defenses as to Pedro Miranda is ordered stricken. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $1,240 shall be paid by defendant Pedro Miranda within 30 days of notice of this order. =610/BEC
